# Chronos CMS

> Portfolio-focused headless CMS. Manages blog posts, portfolio projects, and structured CV data (skills, work experience, education, certifications, testimonials). Built on Fastify 4 + PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM. Content is stored as TipTap ProseMirror JSON.

Base URL: configured per deployment (e.g. https://api.yourdomain.com). All examples use `$API`.

---

## Authentication

```
POST $API/auth/login
Content-Type: application/json

{ "email": "admin@chronos.dev", "password": "Admin1234!" }

â†’ 200 { "token": "<jwt>", "user": { "id", "email", "name", "role" } }
```

Every `/admin/*` endpoint requires:

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

---

## TipTap JSON format

All rich-text `content` fields use TipTap ProseMirror JSON. The API accepts and returns this format by default. Append `?format=html` or `?format=markdown` to any public read endpoint to get converted output instead.

**Empty document**
```json
{ "type": "doc", "content": [] }
```

**Paragraph**
```json
{
  "type": "paragraph",
  "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "Hello world" }]
}
```

**Heading (h2)**
```json
{
  "type": "heading",
  "attrs": { "level": 2 },
  "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "Section title" }]
}
```

**Bold / italic / code inline**
```json
{ "type": "text", "text": "Bold", "marks": [{ "type": "bold" }] }
{ "type": "text", "text": "Italic", "marks": [{ "type": "italic" }] }
{ "type": "text", "text": "code", "marks": [{ "type": "code" }] }
```

**Link**
```json
{
  "type": "text",
  "text": "Click here",
  "marks": [{ "type": "link", "attrs": { "href": "https://example.com", "target": "_blank" } }]
}
```

**Bullet list**
```json
{
  "type": "bulletList",
  "content": [
    { "type": "listItem", "content": [{ "type": "paragraph", "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "Item one" }] }] },
    { "type": "listItem", "content": [{ "type": "paragraph", "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "Item two" }] }] }
  ]
}
```

**Code block**
```json
{
  "type": "codeBlock",
  "attrs": { "language": "typescript" },
  "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "const x: number = 42" }]
}
```

**Blockquote**
```json
{
  "type": "blockquote",
  "content": [{ "type": "paragraph", "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "A quote." }] }]
}
```

**Full example document**
```json
{
  "type": "doc",
  "content": [
    {
      "type": "heading",
      "attrs": { "level": 1 },
      "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "My Post" }]
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": [
        { "type": "text", "text": "This is " },
        { "type": "text", "text": "bold", "marks": [{ "type": "bold" }] },
        { "type": "text", "text": " text." }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## Blog Posts

Public endpoints return content flattened to the requested locale plus a `hreflang[]` array.

### List published posts
```
GET $API/posts?lang=en&page=1&limit=10&tag=typescript&format=json
```

### Get a single post by slug
```
GET $API/posts/my-post-slug?lang=en&format=markdown
```

### Search posts
```
GET $API/posts/search?q=javascript&lang=en
```

### Create a post (admin)
```
POST $API/admin/posts
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "defaultLocale": "en",
  "status": "PUBLISHED",
  "featured": false,
  "scheduledAt": null,
  "tags": ["typescript", "webdev"],
  "translations": {
    "en": {
      "title": "My Post Title",
      "slug": "my-post-title",
      "content": { "type": "doc", "content": [ ... ] },
      "excerpt": "Short summary of the post.",
      "metaTitle": "SEO title",
      "metaDescription": "SEO description"
    }
  }
}

â†’ 201 { "data": Post }
```

### Update a post (partial, translations are upserted)
```
PUT $API/admin/posts/:id
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{
  "status": "PUBLISHED",
  "translations": {
    "en": { "title": "Updated title", "slug": "updated-slug" }
  }
}
```

### Schedule a post
Set `"status": "DRAFT"` and `"scheduledAt": "2026-07-01T09:00:00.000Z"`. A background job publishes it automatically.

### Delete a post
```
DELETE $API/admin/posts/:id
â†’ 204
```

### Bulk actions
```
POST $API/admin/posts/bulk
{ "action": "publish" | "unpublish" | "delete", "ids": ["id1", "id2"] }
```

---

## Portfolio Projects

### List published projects
```
GET $API/projects?lang=en
```

### Get a single project
```
GET $API/projects/my-project-slug?lang=en&format=html
```

### Create a project (admin)
```
POST $API/admin/projects
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{
  "defaultLocale": "en",
  "status": "PUBLISHED",
  "featured": true,
  "order": 0,
  "coverImage": "/uploads/cover.webp",
  "techStack": ["TypeScript", "React", "Fastify"],
  "githubUrl": "https://github.com/username/repo",
  "liveUrl": "https://demo.example.com",
  "translations": {
    "en": {
      "title": "My Project",
      "slug": "my-project",
      "summary": "One-line description shown on the portfolio grid.",
      "content": { "type": "doc", "content": [ ... ] },
      "metaTitle": "My Project â€” Portfolio",
      "metaDescription": "Detailed SEO description."
    }
  }
}

â†’ 201 { "data": Project }
```

### Update a project
```
PUT $API/admin/projects/:id
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{ "featured": true, "techStack": ["Go", "React"] }
```

### Reorder projects
```
PUT $API/admin/projects/reorder
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{ "ids": ["id_first", "id_second", "id_third"] }
```

### Delete a project
```
DELETE $API/admin/projects/:id
â†’ 204
```

---

## Skills

Levels: `BEGINNER` | `INTERMEDIATE` | `ADVANCED` | `EXPERT`

### List visible skills
```
GET $API/skills?category=Frontend
```

### Create a skill
```
POST $API/admin/skills
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{
  "name": "TypeScript",
  "category": "Frontend",
  "level": "EXPERT",
  "icon": "typescript",
  "visible": true,
  "order": 0
}
```

### Update a skill
```
PUT $API/admin/skills/:id
{ "level": "EXPERT", "visible": true }
```

### Reorder skills
```
PUT $API/admin/skills/reorder
{ "ids": ["id1", "id2", "id3"] }
```

### Delete a skill
```
DELETE $API/admin/skills/:id
```

---

## Work Experience

Supports i18n: `role` and rich-text `description` are per-locale; company/location/dates are global.

### List experiences
```
GET $API/experiences?lang=en
```

### Create an experience
```
POST $API/admin/experiences
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "location": "Paris, France",
  "startDate": "2022-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "endDate": null,
  "url": "https://acme.com",
  "logoUrl": "/uploads/acme.webp",
  "translations": {
    "en": {
      "role": "Senior Full-Stack Engineer",
      "description": { "type": "doc", "content": [ ... ] }
    }
  }
}
```

### Update / delete / reorder
```
PUT  $API/admin/experiences/:id
PUT  $API/admin/experiences/reorder  { "ids": [...] }
DELETE $API/admin/experiences/:id
```

---

## Education

Same structure as Work Experience. Fields: `institution`, `field`, `startDate`, `endDate`, `url`, `logoUrl`. Translations: `degree`, `description`.

```
GET    $API/education?lang=en
POST   $API/admin/education
PUT    $API/admin/education/:id
PUT    $API/admin/education/reorder  { "ids": [...] }
DELETE $API/admin/education/:id
```

Example body:
```json
{
  "institution": "MIT",
  "field": "Computer Science",
  "startDate": "2018-09-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "endDate": "2022-06-30T00:00:00.000Z",
  "translations": {
    "en": { "degree": "B.Sc.", "description": { "type": "doc", "content": [] } }
  }
}
```

---

## Certifications

```
GET    $API/certifications
POST   $API/admin/certifications
PUT    $API/admin/certifications/:id
PUT    $API/admin/certifications/reorder  { "ids": [...] }
DELETE $API/admin/certifications/:id
```

Example body:
```json
{
  "title": "AWS Solutions Architect â€“ Associate",
  "issuer": "Amazon Web Services",
  "issuedAt": "2024-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "expiresAt": "2027-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "credentialUrl": "https://aws.amazon.com/verification/...",
  "logoUrl": "/uploads/aws.webp"
}
```

---

## Testimonials

```
GET    $API/testimonials?featured=true
POST   $API/admin/testimonials
PUT    $API/admin/testimonials/:id
PUT    $API/admin/testimonials/reorder  { "ids": [...] }
DELETE $API/admin/testimonials/:id
```

Example body:
```json
{
  "author": "Jane Smith",
  "role": "CTO",
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "avatarUrl": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  "content": "Working with this developer was a pleasure. Highly recommend.",
  "rating": 5,
  "featured": true,
  "visible": true
}
```

---

## Media (image upload)

Uploaded files are stored at `/uploads/*`. Raster images are auto-converted to WebP (max 1920Ă—1920, quality 85). SVG is stored as-is.

```
POST $API/admin/media
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; field name: "file"

â†’ 201 { "data": { "url": "/uploads/<uuid>.webp", "filename", "mimeType", "size" } }
```

Use the returned `url` in post/project `content`, `coverImage`, `logoUrl`, or `ogImage` fields.

```
GET    $API/admin/media        (list all, newest first)
DELETE $API/admin/media/:filename
```

---

## Site Settings & Branding

### Read settings (public)
```
GET $API/settings
â†’ { "data": { "themeConfig": {...}, "brandConfig": {...} } }
```

### Update settings (admin)
```
PUT $API/admin/settings
Authorization: Bearer <token>

{
  "brandConfig": {
    "siteName": "LoĂŻc Dev",
    "tagline": "Full-stack engineer",
    "siteUrl": "https://loic.dev",
    "seoTitle": "LoĂŻc Dev â€” Portfolio",
    "seoDescription": "Full-stack engineer specialising in TypeScript and React.",
    "logoUrl": "/uploads/logo.webp",
    "ogImage": "/uploads/og.webp",
    "socialLinks": [
      { "platform": "github",   "url": "https://github.com/username" },
      { "platform": "linkedin", "url": "https://linkedin.com/in/username" },
      { "platform": "twitter",  "url": "https://twitter.com/username" }
    ]
  }
}
```

Supported social platforms: `github` `linkedin` `twitter` `bluesky` `mastodon` `instagram` `youtube` `twitch` `devto` `dribbble` `codepen` `stackoverflow` `discord` `rss`

---

## i18n

- Append `?lang=fr` to any public endpoint to get content in French (falls back to `defaultLocale`).
- Append `?lang=fr&strict=1` to return only content that has a French translation.
- Translations are **upserted** on PUT â€” send only the locales you want to change.
- Every public post/project/page response includes `"hreflang": [{ "locale": "en", "slug": "..." }, ...]` for `<link rel="alternate">` injection.

---

## RSS & Sitemap

```
GET $API/rss.xml?lang=en
GET $API/rss/fr.xml
GET $API/sitemap.xml
```

---

## Admin stats & activity

```
GET $API/admin/stats        â†’ { posts, pages, projects, media, users, recentPosts, ... }
GET $API/admin/activity     â†’ recent create/update/delete log
```

---

## Contact form

```
POST $API/contact
{ "name": "Jane", "email": "jane@example.com", "subject": "Hello", "message": "..." }
â†’ 201

GET   $API/admin/contact?status=NEW&page=1
PATCH $API/admin/contact/:id   { "status": "ARCHIVED" }
DELETE $API/admin/contact/:id
```

---

## Common workflows

### Publish a new blog post
1. `POST /auth/login` â†’ save `token`
2. Build TipTap JSON from your text (see format section above)
3. `POST /admin/posts` with `translations.en.content` = TipTap doc
4. Set `"status": "PUBLISHED"` or `"scheduledAt"` for future publishing

### Add a project to the portfolio
1. (Optional) `POST /admin/media` to upload a cover image â†’ get `url`
2. `POST /admin/projects` with `coverImage`, `techStack`, `githubUrl`, `liveUrl`, and `translations`

### Update branding / social links
`PUT /admin/settings` with a `brandConfig` payload. Partial updates are fine â€” only the keys you send are changed.

### Bulk-publish drafts
`POST /admin/posts/bulk` with `{ "action": "publish", "ids": [...] }`

### Add a skill to the CV
`POST /admin/skills` with `name`, `category`, `level`, `visible: true`

### Reorder portfolio projects
`PUT /admin/projects/reorder` with `{ "ids": ["id_first", "id_second", ...] }`

---

## Error responses

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| 400 | Validation error â€” `{ "error": "message" }` |
| 401 | Missing or invalid JWT |
| 403 | Insufficient role |
| 404 | Resource not found |
| 409 | Conflict (duplicate slug/email) |
| 429 | Rate limit exceeded (contact endpoint: 3 req/min per IP) |
